content: Multi-touch architecture: Track by touch.identifier (never array index). Use useRef (not useState) for touch coordinates to avoid 60fps re-renders. Handle touchcancel events. Apply touch-action: none CSS to prevent browser gesture interference. The useMultiTouch hook should return handlers and state but NOT dispatch to GameContext - let the screen component decide when to dispatch. Pointer Events API (pointerId + setPointerCapture) is a modern alternative but touch events have better iOS Safari support.
